# dysphagia.cn

> Multilingual dysphagia knowledge hub covering clinical assessment, nutrition, caregiving, and IDDSI standards. Available in Simplified Chinese (mainland China), Traditional Chinese (HK), Traditional Chinese (Taiwan), and English.

## Languages Available
- Simplified Chinese (zh-hans): /zh-hans/ — for mainland China readers
- Traditional Chinese HK (zh-hant-hk): /zh-hant-hk/ — for Hong Kong readers
- Traditional Chinese TW (zh-hant-tw): /zh-hant-tw/ — for Taiwan readers
- English (en): /en/ — for international readers

## Topic Categories
- Clinical assessment: screening tools, VFSS, FEES, manometry, geriatric dysphagia screening
- Nutrition: protein, micronutrients, texture-modified meals, high-calorie soft foods, zinc and vitamin D supplementation, malnutrition cycle management, Chinese cuisine texture modification, seasonal recipes
- IDDSI standards: levels 0-7, testing methods, food mapping, yum cha ordering guide
- Conditions: stroke, Parkinson's, ALS/MND, dementia, head & neck cancer, multiple sclerosis, GERD, post-ICU dysphagia, cognitive impairment, presbyphagia, oral cancer, critical illness recovery, cardiac surgery, COPD
- Caregiving: mealtime techniques, equipment, family support, community nursing, carer training, hospital discharge planning, respite care, oral motor exercises
- Recipes: soft Cantonese dishes, winter melon soft recipes, HK-adapted texture-modified cooking, seasonal Taiwan soft recipes
- zh-hant-hk conditions (2026-05-09): oral cancer swallowing rehabilitation, critical illness post-ICU dysphagia, cardiac surgery swallowing
- zh-hant-hk clinical (2026-05-09): Hong Kong public hospital SLT services guide
- Standards: T/SATA, IDDSI, NHC guidelines, food safety
- Rehabilitation techniques: swallowing exercises, neurostimulation, compensatory strategies

- /zh-hans/clinical/2026-05-09-mendelsohn-maneuver-zh-hans — Mendelsohn手法操作指南：机制、适应证与临床训练方案
- /zh-hans/clinical/2026-05-09-effortful-swallow-technique — 用力吞咽技术详解：机制、操作规范与临床应用
- /zh-hans/clinical/2026-05-09-vocal-fold-adduction-exercises — 声带内收训练与吞咽障碍康复：喉保护功能强化指南
- /zh-hans/clinical/2026-05-09-neurostimulation-dysphagia — 神经肌肉电刺激治疗吞咽障碍：临床应用与参数规范
- /zh-hans/clinical/2026-05-09-vitalstim-transcutaneous — 经皮电刺激（VitalStim）临床应用：设备操作、参数优化与内地实践
